allow: Bash(sed -i 's/OpenCode Sans Sample/Octo AI Sans Sample/g; s/OpenCode Mono Sample/Octo AI Mono Sample/g' packages/ui/src/components/font.stories.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/OpenCode logo assets/Octo AI logo assets/g' packages/ui/src/components/logo.stories.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/built-in OpenCode icon set/built-in Octo AI icon set/g' packages/ui/src/components/icon.stories.tsx)

Bash(xargs sed -i 's/provider === "opencode"/provider === "octo"/g; s/provider\\.id === "opencode"/provider.id === "octo"/g; s/provider\\.id !== "opencode"/provider.id !== "octo"/g; s/\\.id !== "opencode"/.id !== "octo"/g; s/clientInfo: { name: "opencode"/clientInfo: { name: "octo"/g; s/name: "opencode-debug"/name: "octo-debug"/g')
